response.justification: Candidate is a strong full-stack software craftsman with broad polyglot experience, but the role explicitly requires 8 years of C++ programming and 5 years building large-scale infrastructure/distributed systems with compute/storage/hardware architecture focus. Resume shows only a brief C/C++ stint at National Instruments (~7 months) and primarily TypeScript/Node.js/DLang work. No demonstrated cloud compute platform leadership or production cloud architecture at the scale required.
strengths: Strong software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development)
Experience with low-latency, high-throughput systems at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic (millions of req/sec)
Mentoring and teaching track record via workshops, dojos, and courses
concerns: Lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience — only a short C/C++ role at National Instruments
No demonstrated experience leading or building an internal cloud compute platform
No formal technical leadership role mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers at scale

key_factors.factor: Missing large-scale cloud compute platform background
